programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: Jamie learns that her first love Sawyer is the architect of a development that wants to change her beloved neighborhood and threatens her bookstore. Can old Valentines help them see eye to eye? Starring Maggie Lawson and Sam Page.

programme.title: The Christmas Secret
programme.desc: Christine Eisley is a single mom of two struggling to keep her family afloat during Christmas. As the holidays progress, she comes to find her struggles are replaced by good fortune.

programme.title: Royal Matchmaker
programme.desc: A NYC matchmaker is hired by a king to find his son a suitable wife in time for a celebration. As the clock ticks towards the deadline, he finds him the perfect wife, only to realize that she's fallen in love with him.

programme.title: The Lost Valentine
programme.desc: Susan Allison, TV reporter, receives a sentimental news assignment: the story of Caroline Thomas, who has waited 60 years for her pilot husband; declared missing in action during World War II, to return to her.

programme.title: Love Under the Stars
programme.desc: When a 30-something woman living in an infinite state of youth is finally forced out into the real world, she befriends a young girl and a widower that will teach her that it is okay to grow up. Stars Ashley Newbrough.

programme.title: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: When author Cassie's first novel isn't selling, she is paired on a book tour with author Elliot to boost Cassie's sales - but along the way a romance starts to blossom. Stars Jen Lilley, Kevin McGarry, and Mary-Margaret Humes.

programme.title: Once Upon a Prince
programme.desc: Susanna accepts help one day from handsome stranger Nate. Sparks between them fly, but when a photo of them gets leaked to the press, Susanna is in for a shock when she discovers he's about to become King Nathaniel of Cambria.

programme.title: An Unexpected Valentine
programme.desc: A chance encounter on Valentine's Day brings Hannah and Finn together as they race through New York City to return a lost engagement ring and save one couple's special day. Stars Lacey Chabert, Robert Buckley.

programme.title: Haul Out the Halloween
programme.desc: New, Halloween-obsessed neighbors inspire residents of Evergreen Lane to haul out their spookiest costumes and décor to become EverSCREAM Lane. Stars Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown, Stephen Tobolowsky, Melissa Peterman, Ellen Travolta.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: After discovering a long-lost painting, museum curator Avery and new board member Peter investigate the artwork's origins as they plan a gala to unveil it. Stars Lacey Chabert, Kevin McGarry, Autumn Reeser, Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Expectations
programme.desc: Avery and Peter try to keep the romance alive while renovating an old house and juggling work, but everything takes on a new perspective when Avery has a surprise for Peter. Stars Lacey Chabert and Kevin McGarry.

programme.title: My Secret Valentine
programme.desc: A young woman takes advice from the chalkboard notes that her mysterious house rental tenant leaves when a slick sales rep arrives with plans to buy her family' prized winery. Stars Lacey Chabert, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Molly runs the very popular Bridal Boot Camp, helping prospective brides-to-be get in shape, for their big day. But things get complicated when she meets Nick, the fiancé of one of her clients and sparks fly.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Newly engaged Nick and Molly have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams. Things get even more complicated when Steven, who once left Molly at the altar, comes back into her life with a business offer.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: A mix up on her first day of work sends Shane to the Dead Letter Office, where a group of quirky characters led by Oliver try to deliver the undeliverable. Stars Eric Mabius and Kristin Booth. SSD Movie #1.

programme.title: Love, Of Course
programme.desc: When widowed mother Amy moves her daughter Cara to her college dorm, Amy finds herself searching for the next step. While at the university, Amy gets an offer she can't refuse and meets Noah and discovers a new life of her own.

programme.title: Loving Leah
programme.desc: When Leah's husband Benjamin dies suddenly, Benjamin's brother Jake is stunned to learn he is expected to marry Leah to carry on the name. Jake suggests to Leah that they get married and maintain a secretly platonic relationship.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: Maddie is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, Maddie's luck begins to turn around in all aspects of her life. But then her first love Nate unexpectedly returns.

programme.title: Falling for You
programme.desc: Radio host Lacey is hosting a bachelor bakeoff to raise money to save the radio station. When her star bachelor backs out, she enlists visiting businessman Zac to fill the spot.

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: Matt's passion transforms his bread from bland to extraordinary. When his bread loses its magic, the island locals panic and turn to Annie, Matt's childhood friend and true love for help. Stars Eloise Mumford, Brant Daugherty.

programme.title: A Royal Setting
programme.desc: Ruby, a world-renowned gemologist is hired by Prince Luca to restore the crown jewels and design his crown challenging tradition and complicating his relationship with his mother, the queen. Stars Jen Lilley, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: The Stars Between Us
programme.desc: Seven years ago, Kim made a connection with a stranger during an eclipse event. Now a fledgling news reporter, Kim returns to Illinois for this year's eclipse, unaware that their paths may cross again. Stars Sarah Drew, Matt Long.

programme.title: Love of the Irish
programme.desc: Tired of her bad luck, Fiona takes her mom on a trip to Ireland to turn things around where she meets a charming single dad who helps her make her own luck. Stars Shenae Grimes-Beech, Stephen Hagan, Moira Kelly.

programme.title: Hearts in the Game
programme.desc: A NYC publicist helps an MLB pitcher find his way back to the game and to her heart. Starring Erin Cahill and Marco Grazzini.

programme.title: Romance with a Twist
programme.desc: Ex-dancer, Luna, pairs up with Bennett, a world-class aerialist, when he finds himself without a partner for his upcoming silks performance for the local arts festival. Stars Jocelyn Hudon, Olivier Renaud.

programme.title: The Perfect Setting
programme.desc: An aspiring jewelry designer returns to Belgium to visit her grandfather and hopefully win the Valentines Day Diamond Contest. Stars Laci J. Mailey, David Elsendoorn.

programme.title: Love, Romance & Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts? Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: Romance at Hope Ranch
programme.desc: Hope Morgan sets out to begin a new chapter of her life—fulfilling her childhood dream of running a ranch in the picturesque town of Ruidoso, New Mexico and reviving the beloved Giddy Up Gala. Stars Alison Sweeney, Gabriel Hogan.

programme.title: One Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: With her book tour in two weeks and his expanding business plans, Cara and Ben put their long engagement behind them and book the chalet for a small wedding with friends and family. Starring Taylor Cole and Jack Turner.

programme.title: Paris, Wine & Romance
programme.desc: Isabella travels to Paris to compete in a major wine competition. While there she meets, Jacque, a competitor who shows her the city of love and teaches her about how wine is more than just a business. Jen Lilley, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: A Little Daytime Drama
programme.desc: In order to save her daytime soap drama from cancellation, head writer Maggie must convince Darin, fan favorite actor and her real-life ex-boyfriend, to return to the show. Stars Jen Lilley, Ryan Paevey, Linda Dano.

programme.title: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: When her high school boyfriend, a superstar baseball player, returns to town, a single-parent finds the inspiration to reinvent her struggling diner... and revisits the past to find something even better for the future.

programme.title: Home Turf
programme.desc: Cassidy is the president of a small college whose life is thrown for a loop when freshmen on the football team move into her home. Can Logan, the handsome coach, help smooth things over? Stars Nikki DeLoach, Warren Christie.

programme.title: Texas Two-Step
programme.desc: Olivia returns to Texas to help her aunt with her country music bar that's fallen on hard times and reconnects with Luke, her childhood sweetheart turned cowboy, and her passion for dancing. Stars Heather Hemmens, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Hearts of Winter
programme.desc: An interior designer brings new life to the house of a widower and his daughter and finds love in the process. Stars Jill Wagner, Victor Webster, Rukiya Bernard.

programme.title: Love on the Slopes
programme.desc: NYC-based editor, Alex, is sent to an extreme sports outpost, to write a story. At first, she fails at everything, much to the chagrin of Cole, an extreme sports enthusiast who thinks this city girl should head back to New York.

programme.title: Love on the Danube: Love Song
programme.desc: Fellow cruise passengers, Sarah and Jack, play matchmaker with their music loving widowed parents, as they cruise down the Danube visiting European cities. Stars Nazneen Contractor, Wes Brown, Kathryn Drysdale, Catherine Disher.

programme.title: All's Fair in Love & Mahjong
programme.desc: A school nurse finds unexpected hope through teaching Mahjong, the centuries‑old Chinese game, which helps her build community and open her heart again. Stars Fiona Gubelmann, Paul Campbell, Yan-Kay Crystal Lowe.

programme.title: Haunted Wedding
programme.desc: Jana and Brian's plan to wed is in jeopardy when Angelique, a ghost in an 18th century wedding dress, vows to stop it. The couple must work together to save their wedding from disaster. Stars Janel Parrish, Dominic Sherwood.

programme.title: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: Eric Randall, an author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his niece and nephew for the holidays. Eric turns to his friend April, a lover of all things Christmas, for help. Stars Jesse Metcalfe and Fiona Gublemann.

programme.title: The Snow Must Go On
programme.desc: A former Broadway star agrees to direct his niece's high school Christmas musical in the hopes of impressing an influential Broadway producer. Stars Heather Hemmens, Corey Cott.

programme.title: Our Holiday Story
programme.desc: A loving couple shares the story of how they met and fell in love when their daughter's boyfriend comes to meet them for the first time at Christmas. Starring Nikki DeLoach and Warren Christie.

programme.title: A Royal Montana Christmas
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by her royal duties, Princess Victoria visits Big Sky Country for Christmas and meets her dashing guide at the ranch. She must decide if love is worth leaving her royal life behind. Fiona Gubelmann, Warren Christie.

programme.title: A Glenbrooke Christmas
programme.desc: Longing to be accepted for herself and not just her wealth, an heiress heads to the small town of Glenbrooke, where she discovers the joys of a simple Christmas, community, and maybe even love. Stars Autumn Reeser, Antonio Cupo.

programme.title: We Met in December
programme.desc: After a magical night sharing hopes, dreams, and a perfect kiss, strangers Annie and Dave lose each other with no way to connect. They embark on a quest to find each other by Christmas. Stars Autumn Reeser, Niall Matter.

programme.title: Cross Country Christmas
programme.desc: Former classmates Lina and Max are traveling home for the holidays, until a storm hits and they have to work together to make it home in time, no matter the mode of transportation. Stars Rachael Leigh Cook, Greyston Holt.

programme.title: Merry Cruise-mas!
programme.desc: The Hallmark Christmas Cruise kicks off with festive fun, as the passengers meet their favorite stars and begin their journey with a Christmas tree lighting at sea. Adventure and surprises await on this unforgettable voyage!

programme.title: Christmas Island
programme.desc: When a snowstorm diverts Kate's first private flight en route to Switzerland to Christmas Island, she must team up with an air traffic controller to secure her dream job as the family's pilot. Stars Rachel Skarsten, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Three Wise Men and a Baby
programme.desc: Three brothers get the surprise of their lives when they are forced to work together and care for a baby over the holidays. Starring Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, and Margaret Colin.

programme.title: Three Wiser Men and a Boy (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: The Brenner brothers are back and putting on a holiday pageant for young Thomas while trying to cope with life's curveballs, including their mom's new boyfriend. Stars Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, Margaret Colin.

programme.title: Three Wisest Men (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: As life pushes the family in different directions, the Brenner boys decide they need to put on the Best Christmas Ever to bring everyone back together. (Paul Campbell, Tyler Hynes, Andrew Walker, Margaret Colin)

programme.title: Christmas by Starlight
programme.desc: When her family's beloved eatery, The Starlight Café, is slated for demolition, Annie vows to put a stop to it before Christmas. Stars Paul Campbell and Kimberley Sustad.

programme.title: The Santa Class
programme.desc: Kate North, the owner of a struggling Santa School, and her instructor, Dan, must help an amnesia-stricken Santa Claus regain his memories to save Christmas and hopefully her school as well. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Family for Christmas
programme.desc: When an ambitious anchorwoman makes on offhand wish to an office party Santa, she wakes up the next morning to find she is married to her college sweetheart, an event that has changed her world. Stars Lacey Chabert, Tyron Leitso.

programme.title: She's Making a List
programme.desc: Isabel needs to determine if a young girl belongs on the Naughty or Nice List; meanwhile, she's falling for the girl's father and learning that the world isn't so black and white. Starring Lacey Chabert, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Haul Out the Holly
programme.desc: When Emily unexpectedly spends the holidays alone at her parents' house, their HOA insists that she participate in its many Christmas festivities. Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown, Stephen Tobolowsky, Melissa Peterman, Ellen Travolta.

programme.title: Haul Out the Holly: Lit Up
programme.desc: Emily and Jared lead the Evergreen Lane HOA toward another successful Christmas season. Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown.

programme.title: A Wish for Christmas
programme.desc: Sara is the type of woman who prefers to sit on the sidelines at work, but when her big idea for a Christmas initiative is stolen, she makes a wish to Santa that she'll finally have the courage to stand up for herself.

programme.title: Merry Christmas, Ted Cooper!
programme.desc: An unlucky weatherman, Ted, continues to see the glass half full. He's determined to share his Christmas cheer with his high school crush, Hope, when they reconnect. Starring Robert Buckley and Kimberley Sustad.

programme.title: Eat, Drink and Be Buried: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: Henry and Maggie attend party of a local publisher, where his son and stepson reenact a historical dual. Someone, however, has loaded the pistol with a real musket ball, so when son pulls the trigger, he kills his stepbrother.

programme.title: Roux the Day: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
programme.desc: Henry and Maggie find themselves in a murder mystery where secrets hidden within a treasured recipe book have dire consequences for all who own it. Starring Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: A Tale of Three Letters
programme.desc: The POstables are back identifying the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters which have a surprising, personal impact on all of them. Stars Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth, Yan-Kay Crystal Lowe, Geoff Gustafson, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Murder, with Love
programme.desc: Former prosecutor-turned-therapist Hailey Dean is acutely observant. During a tragic week, one of her patients loses her parents to fatal accidents. Stars Kellie Martin, Viv Leacock, Giacomo Baessato, Cindy Busby.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When Hailey helps her friend Pam sell her recently deceased parent's estate, she becomes suspicious when Pam suddenly leaves town without notice. To make matters worse, Pam's boyfriend is the sudden victim of an accident.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Dating is Murder
programme.desc: Attorney turned therapist Hailey Dean is pulled into another investigation when a popular new dating app links multiple missing persons cases from around the city. Stars Kellie Martin.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Site Unseen
programme.desc: A dedicated archaeologist gets involved in a murder investigation when she and her students unearth a dead body while searching for evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith and James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Past Malice
programme.desc: When Emma Fielding is recruited to aid in a groundbreaking discovery beneath the Chandler Castle, she is swept into another mystery when she finds her colleague murdered in the crypts. Stars Courtney Thorne Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: More Bitter than Death
programme.desc: After a friend and head of the National Archaeological Society meets an untimely death, Emma and Agent Conner find themselves questioning her colleagues' motives. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Silent Witness
programme.desc: When consumer reporter, Ruby Herring stumbles onto a murder, the spunky redhead discovers a knack for crime solving. With the help of a handsome detective, Ruby finds a new career covering crime. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Her Last Breath
programme.desc: Ruby and Detective Killian investigate a suspicious fatal car accident. With their yin and yang relationship, they solve the case, until Ruby finds new evidence that they may have it all wrong. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Prediction Murder
programme.desc: When crime reporter Ruby Herring receives clues to a murder that happened five years earlier involving a local psychic, she joins forces with Detective Jake Killian to help crack the case. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Darrow & Darrow Pilot
programme.desc: Claire Darrow, a lawyer, fights for what's right, regardless of whether it makes her a dime. Joanna, Claire's estranged mother and a lawyer as well, would rather make a profit. They clash on nearly everything.

programme.title: Chronicle Mysteries: Recovered
programme.desc: Alex McPherson launches a podcast with a cold case from her past. With the help of local reporter, Drew Godfrey, new mysteries mix with old as the two work to recover what's been lost. Starring Alison Sweeney and Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Newlywed and Dead
programme.desc: Photographer Allie Adams is shocked when the groom at a wedding she is covering is shot dead. What's even worse, is she must convince Detective Sam Acosta that her brother isn't the killer. Stars Alexa PenaVega, Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Dead Over Diamonds
programme.desc: Photographer Allie and Detective Sam's investigation into a priceless stolen necklace leads to danger and an unexpected death. Stars Alexa & Carlos PenaVega, Erik Estrada.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Exit Stage Death
programme.desc: Allie and Sam navigate the world of amateur theatrics as they pursue the killer of an actress. Their largest obstacle is trying to assess whether the cast members are lying or telling the truth. Starring Alexa & Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Nikki & Nora: Sister Sleuths
programme.desc: Fraternal twins Nikki and Nora are forced back into each other's lives when they inherit a detective agency. As they solve a murder, they realize their differences may be their greatest advantage. Stars Hunter King, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance is the prime suspect, successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case. Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove gets entangled in another case…and with Detective Kyle Carter. Can they read between the lines to find the murderer? Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.
